use_cases: Project managers tracking task progress across workflow stages
Development teams managing sprints with drag-and-drop task cards
Product teams organizing backlog items into actionable tasks
Individual users visualizing personal workflows and to-do lists
Remote teams collaborating on shared project boards
ai_summary: A fully interactive Kanban board with drag-and-drop task management across multiple workflow columns. Features a dark theme with color-coded column headers, animated card transitions using Framer Motion, and a burn barrel for card deletion. Built for project management and task visualization in SaaS or dev-tool contexts.
